data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Pay stub generation with earnings breakdown', but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outputs related to the generation of pay stubs. While the linked use case mentions that the system generates pay stubs, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the pay stubs include an earnings breakdown as required. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement's fulfillment.
gaps: No evidence of pay stub generation including earnings breakdown.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for pay stub generation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the pay stub includes an earnings breakdown.
